title: pelargonium × carbasinum
intro: Pelargonium × carbasinum, also known as the Cape Geranium or Barberton Geranium, is a plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Pelargonium × carbasinum include relief from stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as aid in digestion and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
